description: Fast, low-cost read-only code navigator. Locates symbols, definitions, references, call sites and relevant code across the project using language-server intelligence (lsp_read_symbol / document_symbols / references) plus structural (ast_grep_search) and text (Grep/Glob) search, then reports precise file:line locations with minimal snippets. Never edits — it hands findings back to the Coder.
name: code_scout
